definition:
1. a putting together, arranging, arrangement, organisation, order , (Thucydides): rule , (Demosthenes Orator) 
2. a systematic treatise , (Aristotle Philosopher): a narrative , (Polybius Historicus) 
3. grammatical construction, syntax , (Lucian) 
4. a body of troops , ἡ εἰς μυρίους ς. their contingent  towards 10, 000, (Xenophon Historicus) 
5. a covenant, contract , (Demosthenes Orator) 
6. an assigned impost, contribution , (Demosthenes Orator) 
7. a payment, allowance, pension , (Demosthenes Orator) (ML)
